_meta.description: Plain-English translations for all algorithm signal names. MANDATORY: every client-facing recommendation must use these translations — never expose raw signal names.

google_search.NavBoost: Google tracks how long people stay on your page and whether they come back to search again
google_search.siteAuthority: How much Google trusts your website overall, built up over years of quality content and links from other sites
google_search.OriginalContentScore: Whether your content adds something new that readers can't find anywhere else
google_search.CrUX: How fast your website loads and responds for real visitors using Chrome
google_search.LCP: How quickly the main content of your page appears on screen
google_search.INP: How quickly your website responds when someone clicks or taps something
google_search.CLS: Whether your page jumps around while loading (which annoys visitors)
google_search.E-E-A-T: Whether Google's reviewers see your content as written by someone with real experience and expertise in the topic
google_search.SegIndexer: How fresh and up-to-date Google considers your content to be
google_search.hostAge: How long your domain has been trusted by Google — newer sites take 6–12 months to gain full trust
google_search.Twiddlers: Fine-tuning adjustments Google applies to rankings based on spam detection and language matching
google_search.goodClicks: Visitors clicking on your page and spending time reading it
google_search.badClicks: Visitors clicking on your page and immediately going back to Google
google_search.review_signals: How many Google reviews you have, how recent they are, and how well you respond to them
google_search.gbp_completeness: How complete and accurate your Google Business Profile is
google_search.citation_eligibility: How likely Google's AI is to quote your content in an AI Overview answer at the top of search results

instagram.watch_time: How long people watch your video before stopping
instagram.completion_rate: The percentage of viewers who watch your video all the way through
instagram.sends_per_reach: How often people share your content in direct messages — Instagram's strongest signal for showing Reels to new audiences
instagram.saves: When people save your post to come back to later — signals your content is genuinely useful
instagram.comments: Replies and conversations your post generates
instagram.story_completion_rate: How many people watch all the way through your Story without skipping
instagram.tap_forward_rate: How often people skip past your Story — a high skip rate signals disengagement
instagram.account_engagement_velocity: How consistently your account generates engagement over time
instagram.original_content_indicator: Whether Instagram detects your video was created originally, not copied from TikTok or another platform
instagram.hashtags: Topic tags that help Instagram categorise your content — not amplifiers, just labels
instagram.explore_velocity: How quickly your post gets engagement in the first hour, which determines if Instagram shows it to new audiences on Explore

linkedin.consumption_rate: The percentage of people who click 'see more' to read your full post — LinkedIn's strongest quality signal
linkedin.early_engagement_velocity: How much engagement your post receives in the first 60–90 minutes — determines how widely LinkedIn distributes it
linkedin.topic_authority: How consistently you post about the same professional topics — LinkedIn rewards specialists who stay in their lane
linkedin.connection_strength: How often you and your followers interact — LinkedIn shows your content to people who have engaged with you before
linkedin.dwell_time: How long someone pauses on your post while scrolling — even without liking, time spent signals quality
linkedin.external_link_penalty: LinkedIn reduces reach for posts that send people to other websites — use 'link in comments' instead
linkedin.creator_mode: A LinkedIn account setting that prioritises content distribution over networking
linkedin.document_carousel: A multi-slide PDF post format that generates high reading time and strong distribution
linkedin.native_video: Video uploaded directly to LinkedIn, which gets more reach than a YouTube link
linkedin.poll_completion: When someone votes in your poll — generates quick engagement spikes that boost early distribution
linkedin.profile_completeness: How fully filled-out your LinkedIn profile is — complete profiles rank higher in LinkedIn search

cross_platform.engagement_velocity_window: The critical first window after posting when early engagement determines how many more people see your content
cross_platform.native_content_preference: Every platform gives more reach to content created natively on that platform rather than shared from elsewhere
cross_platform.content_consistency_model: How well the platform's algorithm understands what topics you cover — consistent creators get better distribution
cross_platform.interaction_quality_hierarchy: Not all engagement is equal — DMs and saves are worth more than likes, which are worth more than views
cross_platform.thumbnail_and_first_frame: The preview image or opening frame people see before clicking — determines whether they click at all
cross_platform.account_health_floor: The minimum distribution ceiling for accounts in good standing — violations permanently lower this ceiling
cross_platform.posting_cadence_consistency: Posting regularly over time beats posting a lot then going quiet — algorithms reward reliable creators
cross_platform.llm_citability: Whether AI tools like ChatGPT or Gemini are likely to cite your content when answering questions
